azure.label: Azure focus
azure.plan_line: Azure for Monitor/Log Analytics (KQL), Azure SQL, and Data Explorer — the Microsoft-cloud data and observability plane.
azure.base_notes: Query Azure via the official Azure MCP Server in read-only mode: Azure Monitor / Log Analytics (KQL over logs and metrics), Azure SQL, Azure Data Explorer (Kusto/ADX), Cosmos DB, and Storage. The Microsoft-cloud equivalent of Snowflake/BigQuery (warehouse) plus Datadog (observability). Read-only — the server runs with --read-only (write tools filtered out); list resource groups and resources to discover scope before querying. Authenticate with an Azure identity holding a Reader role.
